_template: A2A (Agent2Agent) Agent Card. TEMPLATE ONLY — there is no hosted sdirstat A2A agent at this origin. Set a real `url` (the agent's A2A endpoint) and remove `_template` once one exists. Spec: https://a2a-protocol.org
name: sdirstat
description: Disk-usage analysis: scan a directory tree and report where the space went (totals, treemap data, QDirStat cache, JSON).

skills.name: Scan disk usage
skills.description: Given a path, return total size, entry count, and the largest subtrees.

skills.name: Write a QDirStat cache
skills.description: Produce a QDirStat 2.0 cache file for a scanned path.
